steps.title: Find the requested year
steps.content: The student's goal is to identify when The Canon of Medicine was published. The relevant note gives the year directly: 1025 CE.

steps.title: Exclude other details
steps.content: B identifies the author, C describes the book's use, and D describes its contents, but none gives the publication year. The sentence that names 1025 CE fulfills the goal. The answer is A.
